calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mo & Mo For Order Setting Aside Default & Granting Leave To Defend Action, Calendar Motion: Other, Calendar Motion: Set Aside, Calendar Motion: Default
Off Calendar Nov-20-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Andrew W. Olsson, Esq. 408/298-7120 for pltf & opposing party; Mark L. Mosley, Esq. 510/845-6442 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion to set aside; moving party to pay $500.00 expenses/attorney fees (reasonable costs) as condition to set aside. Deft to answer within 5 days; leave to file cross-complaint. Pltf to prepare order.

Ntc Of Mo & Mo For Order Setting Aside Default & Granting Leave To Defend Action, Calendar Motion: Other, Calendar Motion: Set Aside, Calendar Motion: Default
Off Calendar Oct-30-2001 Continued To Nov-20-01 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: CONTINUED TO 11/20/01: MOVING & OPPOSING PARTY TO LODGE COURTESY COPIES PER LOCAL RULE 8.5. PLEASE ATACH A COVER LETTER CONFIRMING THE NEW HEARING DATE.
